name: Saucy Chicken with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts in half lengthwise and bone if desired. Always ask the butcher to bone them.
2. Marinate the chicken in the sauce in the refrigerator for 2-3 hours. Marinating all day or overnight is also an option if you will be away from home.
3. Preheat the oven broiler or barbecue over charcoal. Turn the chicken once during cooking.
4. Baste with remaining sauce while cooking.
Food Exchange per serving: 3 LOW MEAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 165

Source: Sugar-Free...That's Me by Judith Majors
